default_strategy.appeal_language: Request reconsideration using plan terms, clinical rationale, and clear supporting records.
required_documentation: Chart notes tied to CDT code
Claim form and EOB denial details

frequency_limitations.D1110: Typically limited to 2 prophylaxis visits per 12 months.
frequency_limitations.D4341: Often limited by plan frequency and site eligibility language.

Delta Dental.appeal_language: Reference Delta policy language, clarify clinical findings, and request review against submitted documentation.

frequency_limitations.D4341: Commonly denied when policy requires interval since prior SRP claim.
frequency_limitations.D1110: Usually 2 cleanings per benefit period unless plan allows exceptions.

Cigna Dental.appeal_language: Clarify coding rationale, separate distinct services, and align claim documentation to Cigna processing rules.
